_comment: Degraded-run fixture (F-001): the Security & Compliance label reads did not complete (not connected / module not imported / role denied). Every label read carries a non-Ok status, so the analyzer must render LABELS-01..05 as 'not readable this session' (Verify manually), never a fabricated '0 / no taxonomy'.
